category_sources: Official certificate-ripper repository describes the project as a certificate extraction tool.
source_facts.description says crip is a tool to extract server certificates.
display_name_sources: Official repository package and executable use the name crip.
docs_sources: No separate official docs site was identified; the official README is the best documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official certificate-ripper GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists the crip command-line executable.
